hero.h1: You ship code. Your agent should know your stack.
hero.lead: 40 curated Agent Skills for TYPO3, PHP, Go, Docker, Jira, security, and documentation — portable across Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, Gemini CLI, and 30+ other agents.

problem.h2: Generic AI misses the conventions you ship against every day

items.title: TYPO3 conventions
items.body: Generic agents don't know PSR-12 quirks, TCA, FlexForms, or how DDEV expects extensions to be wired.

items.title: Hardening expectations
items.body: Supply-chain security, SBOMs, OpenSSF Scorecard, signed releases — not the defaults out of the box.

items.title: Operational shape
items.body: Concourse pipelines, Matrix notifications, Jira workflows, Netresearch CI — generic suggestions need rework.

marketplace.h2: One install. Forty skills. Every supported agent.

categoriesSection.lead: Skills grouped by the surfaces they touch. Categories are the AGENTS.md canonical enum; thematic groupings are surface for discovery.

story.body1: Netresearch DTT GmbH is a TYPO3 agency in Leipzig that ships production LMS, e-commerce, and enterprise CMS workloads daily. These skills aren't experiments — they are the patterns our engineers reach for on real client work.
story.body2: We open-source the patterns we trust ourselves with. Every skill in this marketplace runs on at least one Netresearch project.

steps.title: 3. Or use it from any agent

openStandard.body: Built on the Agent Skills spec — portable across Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, OpenAI Codex, Gemini CLI, Amp, Goose, Roo Code, OpenCode, and 30+ more agents.

cta.h2: Use it. Improve it. Submit your own.

footer.maintained: Maintained by Netresearch DTT GmbH, Leipzig.
footer.license: Marketplace catalog: MIT. Skill content: CC-BY-SA-4.0.

ui.searchNoResults: No skills match your query. Try a shorter term.

skill.installLead: Pick whichever fits your project — they all reach the same skill.
skill.altInstall: Or install for any Agent Skills-compatible CLI:
